title: pararuellia poilanei
intro: Pararuellia poilanei, also known as the Vietnamese Pararuellia, is a type of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as exerting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Pararuellia poilanei is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
